title: PeekF1
description: It allows you to keep survival gameplay functional while enjoying the full beauty of shaders without distractions.
body:
# Features
### Three-step F1 toggle
- Full HUD visible
- HUD hidden (hand only)
- HUD completely hidden
### Block Outline Toggle
Choose whether the block outline (the highlight box when looking at blocks) is shown when the HUD is hidden. You can set it using [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
### Temporary HUD key (default: Left Alt)
Momentarily show the HUD while holding the key, even when it’s hidden.


## Highlights
- Perfect for taking screenshots or recording videos with shaders
- Keeps essential info visible for more convenience than full F1
- Allows clean, cinematic views by hiding block outlines when needed


*PeekF1 is cannot be used in conjunction with BetterF1 or BetterF1 Reborn.

Mod Original author: [MovTery](https://modrinth.com/user/MovTery)
Ported from: [BetterF1 Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-f1-reborn)
